positive: A minimalist and geometric depiction of a celestial journey. Central subject is a stylized, roaring cosmic whale traversing a deep indigo nebula. The whale is rendered with crisp, bioluminescent cyan and vibrant magenta lines defining its silhouette, contrasted against deep space black and speckled gold dust. Surrounding elements include abstract, crystalline planetary rings and constellations formed by glowing geometric lines. The style is a blend of Art Deco futurism and modern scientific illustration, emphasizing strong contrast, clean lines, and repeating patterns. Composition is centered and balanced, ideal for a high-quality print repeating background. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, vector art quality, 8k, --ar 1:1
